name: Breakfast Fruit Chimichangas
recipeInstructions:
1. Flour tortillas should be 8-inches in diameter and warm.
2. Prepare the apricot basting sauce; set aside.
3. Heat oven to 500°F.
4. Mix cream cheese, ricotta cheese, sugar, and orange peel thoroughly.
5. Spoon about 1/4 cup of the mixture into the center of each tortilla.
6. Top with 1 tablespoon of preserves.
7. Fold one end of the tortilla up about 1-inch over the mixture.
8. Fold in the right and left sides over the folded end.
9. Fold the remaining side to overlap the others.
10. Brush the edges with egg to seal.
11. Brush each chimichanga with butter.
12. Place seam sides down on an ungreased jelly roll pan, 15 1/2 X 10 1/2 X 1-inch.
13. Bake until chimichangas begin to brown and the filling is hot, about 8 to 10 minutes.
14. Serve with apricots and apricot basting sauce.
